funnyQuote: Clean code, strong coffee and minimal errors.
tagline: Crafting interfaces that feel as good as they look.

about.label: About me
about.heading: Passionate about the craft of the web
about.bio1: I'm a Frontend Developer based in México with 2 years of professional experience building modern web interfaces that are fast, clean, and intuitive.
about.bio2: I specialize in Vue.js and the Nuxt ecosystem, but I'm comfortable working across the JavaScript landscape — React, Next.js, TypeScript, and beyond. I care deeply about code quality, component design, and the user experience.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, I'm probably drinking coffee and thinking about it anyway.

stack.label: Tech stack
stack.heading: Tools I work with
stack.sub: A curated set of technologies I use to build reliable, scalable, and beautiful web products.

experience.label: Experience
experience.heading: My journey so far
experience.sub: Two years of shipping real products, growing as an engineer, and learning what it means to write code that lasts.

highlights: Built and maintained enterprise-scale web applications with Vue.js and Nuxt.js
Designed and implemented component libraries improving team development velocity
Worked closely with UX/UI designers translating mockups into pixel-perfect interfaces
Integrated REST APIs and managed state across complex multi-step user flows
Participated in code reviews, sprint planning, and agile ceremonies
Kickstarted career building real-world UI features from design specifications
Developed responsive layouts and reusable components in React and JavaScript
Learned best practices around version control, code quality, and team workflows
Collaborated with senior developers and absorbed mentorship to sharpen skills fast
Self-taught HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and fundamentals of web development
Built personal projects to practice frontend skills and explore modern frameworks
Explored Vue.js, React, and the JavaScript ecosystem through documentation and courses
Developed a strong problem-solving mindset and passion for clean, maintainable code

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.sub: I'm always open to interesting projects, collaborations, or just a good conversation about web development.
